There is also an internal tension: paragraph 2 removes propensity reweighting because observations are paired, yet paragraph 4 attributes gains to the doubly-robust formulation's robustness to propensity misspecification — these cannot both be fully true as stated.","R1.3":"Three empirical claims (38% cost reduction, 97% success retention, 12-point improvement over cascade baseline) are asserted in the final paragraph without tying them back to the experimental setup, held-out split, or baseline definitions introduced earlier. Strengthening requires visibly grounding each number in the evidence already described.","R1.6":"'Make this stronger' in the context of a research abstract carries a clear prose-quality component: the final sentence of paragraph 3 is redundant and circular ('any deviation strictly increases expected deployment cost' restates 'unique cost-optimal policy'), and several constructions (e.g., 'is therefore the unique... and any deviation from this policy') sacrifice precision for emphasis."},"clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":""}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a load-bearing non-sequitur: 'meta-model attains low MSE → threshold policy is the unique cost-optimal policy under every monotone utility' does not follow and is the principal source of argumentative weakness. There is also an internal tension: paragraph 2 removes propensity reweighting because observations are paired, yet paragraph 4 attributes gains to the doubly-robust formulation's robustness to propensity misspecification — these cannot both be fully true as stated.
rationale.R1.3: Three empirical claims (38% cost reduction, 97% success retention, 12-point improvement over cascade baseline) are asserted in the final paragraph without tying them back to the experimental setup, held-out split, or baseline definitions introduced earlier. Strengthening requires visibly grounding each number in the evidence already described.
rationale.R1.6: 'Make this stronger' in the context of a research abstract carries a clear prose-quality component: the final sentence of paragraph 3 is redundant and circular ('any deviation strictly increases expected deployment cost' restates 'unique cost-optimal policy'), and several constructions (e.g., 'is therefore the unique... and any deviation from this policy') sacrifice precision for emphasis.
